title: WW2 bomb to be blown up as 1,200 homes evacuated
description: Teams are working through the night to limit most of the damage to the surrounding area.
content:
A World War Two bomb discovered at a building site in Plymouth will be destroyed in a controlled explosion on Friday.
More than 1,200 nearby homes have been evacuated as part of a 400m (1,300ft) exclusion zone around the site in the Southway area of ... [1889 chars]

title: Starmer restores powers to ousted hereditary peers in Lords shake-up
description: Dozens handed life peerages in apparent concession, enabling their return to red benches
content:
Dozens of hereditary peers whose seats have been abolished have had their lawmaking powers restored as Keir Starmer seeks to accelerate changes to the House of Lords.
It is understood that 15 Conservative hereditary peers, two Labour and nine crossbe... [1774 chars]

title: Met chief defends officers in Golders Green attack after Greens criticism
description: Sir Mark Rowley says he is "disappointed" that Green Party leader Zack Polanski shared a post condemning how police subdued the suspect.
content:
Metropolitan Police Commissioner Sir Mark Rowley has defended how officers subdued the suspect in the Golders Green attack, after Green Party leader Zack Polanski shared a post condemning their actions.
